Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2:

Ping reviewer Andreas

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Is there a clear error message printed that these encryption types are not supported?

I'm wondering if it makes sense to add a patch to b2_15 and EXA6 that these insecure types are deprecated, to give any users using these algorithms some advance notice that they need to change?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1
> 
> Is there a clear error message printed that these encryption types are not supported?
> 

A "Bad encryption type" error is returned when trying to use an unsupported encryption type, and authentication fails.

> I'm wondering if it makes sense to add a patch to b2_15 and EXA6 that these insecure types are deprecated, to give any users using these algorithms some advance notice that they need to change?

OK, I will push a patch to print a message that the encryption type being used is insecure and is deprecated.

Patch Set 2:

> A "Bad encryption type" error is returned when trying to use an
 > unsupported encryption type, and authentication fails.

Does it make sense to print a different message for a "known" type (e.g. <= 0x0018) that is unsupported?  Something like "using deprecated/insecure encryption type, please update" or similar?

parents.subject: LU-18272 build: remove Summary line from osd-zfs

commit.subject: LU-18256 gss: deprecate insecure enctypes
commit.message:
LU-18256 gss: deprecate insecure enctypes

A number of encryption types declared in the GSS code are deprecated
for security reasons, and should not be used. So remove support for
them in the Lustre code:
- des-cbc-crc
- des-cbc-md4
- des-cbc-md5
- des-cbc-raw
- des-hmac-sha1
- des3-cbc-sha
- des3-cbc-raw
- des3-cbc-sha1
- arcfour-hmac
- arcfour-hmac-exp

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2
Test-Parameters: kerberos=true testlist=sanity-krb5
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ic8dd2470339323be88a416796c8d420ecd2f55e4
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56512
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Aurelien Degremont <adegremont@nvidia.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
